domain.name: Coastal Pressure Washing Co
domain.audience: Homeowners and property managers on the Gulf Coast
domain.summary: Exterior cleaning services for residential and commercial properties, focused on pressure and soft washing.

nodes.title: Pressure Washing
nodes.description: Core high-pressure exterior cleaning service for driveways, siding, and concrete.
nodes.searchIntent: What is pressure washing and when does my property need it?

nodes.title: Soft Washing
nodes.description: Low-pressure cleaning method for delicate surfaces like roofs and painted siding.

nodes.title: Roof Cleaning
nodes.description: Removing algae, lichen, and black streaks from shingle and tile roofs.

edges.reason: Soft washing is a gentler form of pressure washing used where high pressure would cause damage.
Roof cleaning relies on soft washing to avoid stripping or breaking shingles.

pillars.reason: Highest-volume search intent and the hub that every other service links back to.
pillars.targetSearchIntent: What is pressure washing and when does my property need it?

internalLinks.anchorGuidance: Link the phrase 'gentle soft-wash method' on the roof-cleaning page to the soft-washing page.

buildPrompt: Write the pressure-washing pillar page answering its core search intent, then draft the soft-washing and roof-cleaning supporting pages, adding the internal link from roof cleaning to soft washing using the given anchor guidance.
